# MissingCardFixture

A catalog-without-model README: endpoint and config tables, no architecture card.

## Overview
Does widget things.

## API Endpoints
| Method | Path | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `GET` | `/api/widgets` | list |
| `POST` | `/api/resolve` | resolve |
| `GET` | `/api/sources` | list sources |
